suggestion.title: Balance the Shoulders
suggestion.body: Since you have broader shoulders, wearing wide-leg pants or A-line skirts can add beautiful volume to your lower half and create a perfectly balanced silhouette.

suggestion.title: Enhance the V-Taper
suggestion.body: Your build naturally emphasizes the shoulders. A well-fitted polo or a structured jacket will comfortably define your waist without looking too tight, while straight or slightly tapered trousers complete the athletic look.

suggestion.title: Create Natural Curves
suggestion.body: To add dimension to your balanced shape, try using belts to cinch the waist, or wear layered outfits and ruched dresses to create the illusion of flowing curves.

suggestion.title: Broaden the Shoulders
suggestion.body: To add dimension to your straight torso, try layering with structured jackets like blazers or overshirts. A tailored shirt tucked into slim-straight trousers will give you a sharp, defined look.

suggestion.title: Highlight Your Curves
suggestion.body: Your perfectly balanced shape looks best when the waist is highlighted. Wrap dresses, belted coats, and fitted tops are your best friends.

suggestion.title: Athletic Proportions
suggestion.body: You have a balanced, athletic build. Tailored V-necks, fitted shirts, and structured blazers work exceptionally well to enhance your natural proportions without looking overly constricted.

suggestion.title: Draw the Eyes Upward
suggestion.body: To balance wider hips, draw attention to your upper body by wearing boat necks, cowl necks, or tops with ruffled details. Pair them with darker, muted bottoms.

suggestion.title: Balance the Upper Body
suggestion.body: To create a broader chest profile, try layering jackets or wearing lighter-colored shirts. Dark, straight-leg trousers will keep the lower body looking sharp and tailored.

suggestion.title: Elongate Your Profile
suggestion.body: Flowy tops, V-necks, and open cardigans are great for elongating your silhouette and drawing attention vertically. Avoid overly tight belts around the midsection.

suggestion.title: Color Harmony
suggestion.body: Because you are wearing cool tones like blue, adding a light pink, beige, or crisp white shirt can beautifully enhance the look with soft, stylish contrast.

suggestion.title: Earthy & Elevated
suggestion.body: Your outfit features earthy tones. Consider pairing this with a deep forest green, navy, or cream piece to create a rich and sophisticated color palette.

suggestion.title: Balance Bright Colors
suggestion.body: Since you're wearing a strong, vibrant color on top, matching it with neutral or dark bottoms (like black or charcoal) will ground the outfit perfectly.

suggestion.title: Introduce Some Contrast
suggestion.body: Your current outfit relies on very similar shades. Introducing a pop of a complementary color—or even just a white layer underneath—will add visual interest to your look.
